title: Spicy Dabo Penne with Ethiopian Spice
description: A spicy twist on a classic pasta dish, featuring dabo in place of traditional penne, and infused with the bold flavors of Ethiopian spice.
instructions: Cook the dabo according to the package instructions until al dente.
Heat the fancy vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garden peas and cook until tender.
Mix in the Ethiopian berbere spice, fancy salt, and fancy black pepper.
Combine the cooked dabo and the spice mixture.
Serve hot, garnished with additional fancy vegetables if desired.
